name: The Golf Society
about: The Golf Society is a luxury golf simulator venue that combines cutting-edge technology with a private, upscale experience. It features private climate-controlled suites equipped with 15x10 ft screens and Foresight Sports simulator technology, offering an immersive golfing environment accessible 24/7. Membership is required, with options starting at $165 per month, providing unlimited simulator time and access to over 1,800 courses via GSPro software. The venue caters to golfers seeking a premium, flexible alternative to traditional courses, with amenities like private fridges, Wi-Fi, and free parking.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Foresight Sports simulators with 120fps tracking
BYOB policy with fridges in each suite
Private booking app for flexible scheduling

food_and_drink.notes: Members can bring their own food to enjoy in private suites
BYOB policy allows members to bring their own beverages; fridges provided in each suite

simulator_hardware.notes: High-speed 120fps camera system with FSX Live app integration

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The Golf Society does not mention club rentals, so members are expected to bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, members can bring their own food and beverages; each suite has a fridge for storage.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play 18 holes, but unlimited simulator time is included with membership.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children watching TV or not playing do not count as guests, making it family-friendly.
